tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose regulation or early diabetes, despite a low fasting glucose. Creatinine is slightly elevated, possibly indicating reduced renal function. Total CO₂ is low, which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation for diabetes and renal function, and further evaluation of acid-base status.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provider Organization: KfH-Nierenzentrum am Klinikum Freising
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
